issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Multi-router app.config.ts (static + api + client + ssr)
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `createApp` from `vinxi` with a `routers` array containing static, http API (with `base: "/api"`), client, and ssr entries each with handler paths; baseline typically falls back to Express/Vite scaffolding because Vinxi is niche.

scenarios.name: Server functions RPC for todos
scenarios.rationale: Treatment puts `"use server"` at the top of the feature module, exports plain async functions, and shows client components importing them directly so Vinxi handles serialization; baseline writes a fetch-based API layer instead.
